rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 30, 2012, Line 9 - DEFENDANT NATALIE ASSAYAG DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule 5 days to answer - nuisance is not uncertain and sufficient. However non payment appears fatally defective for excessive amount. =(501/REQ)
